words.definition: A button or key that controls the electrical supply to a light, piece of equipment, machine, etc.
words.example: Turn the switch on the wall to turn on the lights.

words.definition: To make a computer do something by pressing a button on the mouse.
words.example: Click on the icon to open the program.

words.definition: Information in a form that a computer can use.
words.example: The scientists collected data from thousands of patients.

words.definition: To move information to your computer from a computer system or the Internet.
words.example: You can download the app for free from the App Store.

words.definition: A set of information stored on a computer.
words.example: Save the file before you close the program.

words.definition: Connected to or available through a computer or a computer network, especially the Internet.
words.example: I prefer to shop online because it saves time.

words.definition: To give all your attention to the thing you are doing.
words.example: It's hard to concentrate when there's a lot of noise.

words.definition: To think about something carefully before making a decision or forming an opinion.
To believe that something is probably true based on your experience and knowledge.
words.example: I suppose the meeting starts at nine o'clock.

words.definition: A talk to a group of people about a particular subject, especially at a college or university.
words.example: The professor gave an interesting lecture about climate change.

words.definition: Something that you can choose instead of something else.
words.example: Taking the bus is a cheaper alternative to driving.
The teacher gave us some tips for passing the exam.

words.definition: A piece of evidence that something is happening or that something exists.
words.example: Dark clouds are a sign that rain is coming.

words.definition: A piece of paper or material fastened to an object that gives information about it.
words.example: Read the label on the bottle before taking the medicine.

words.definition: An idea, problem, or situation that you discuss or write about.
words.example: What is your favourite school subject?
